# LiviPoint — Premium Furniture Store

## What is LiviPoint?

LiviPoint is an online furniture store based in Georgia, USA. We sell handpicked, premium-quality furniture for every room in the home — sofas, beds, dining sets, accent chairs, coffee tables, bookshelves, and more. We focus on quality, style, and convenience with free shipping on orders over $500.

## What we sell

- **Living Room**: Sofas, sectionals, accent chairs, coffee tables, TV stands, bookshelves
- **Bedroom**: Beds, nightstands, dressers, wardrobes, mirrors
- **Dining Room**: Dining tables, dining chairs, buffets, bar stools
- **Office**: Desks, office chairs, shelving
- **Outdoor**: Patio sets, outdoor chairs, garden furniture
- **Decor**: Rugs, lighting, wall art, decorative accessories

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://livipoint.com
- All products: https://livipoint.com/products
- Product search: https://livipoint.com/products?search=<query>
- Categories: https://livipoint.com/categories
- Individual category: https://livipoint.com/categories/<slug>
- Individual product: https://livipoint.com/products/<slug>
- Shopping cart: https://livipoint.com/cart
- Checkout: https://livipoint.com/checkout
- Track order: https://livipoint.com/track-order
- Customer account: https://livipoint.com/account

## Business details

- Location: Georgia, USA
- Delivery: Available across Georgia; scheduling coordinated after purchase
- Free shipping on orders over $500
- Returns accepted within 30 days of delivery
- Customer support via email

## Technical

- Built with Next.js (App Router) + Node.js backend
- Product catalog served via REST API
- Sitemap: https://livipoint.com/sitemap.xml
